topStories.description: The Middle East conflict has disrupted air freight routes, cutting capacity and raising costs for semiconductor shipments from Asia to Europe. Companies are paying more or using inventories, while airlines carry less cargo due to longer routes and extra fuel needs.

topStories.title: Former counter-terrorism head investigated by FBI over alleged leaks
topStories.description: The former counter-terrorism head resigned on Tuesday over the war with Iran, saying the country posed "no imminent threat" to the US.

topStories.title: Congress calls VBSA Bill “constitutional overreach”, flags autonomy risk
topStories.description: Congress says VBSA Bill risks IIT, IIM autonomy, alleges constitutional overreach and lack of state consultation in higher education reforms

topStories.title: Iran Football Federation On FIFA World Cup Participation: "Will Boycott US"
topStories.description: Iran will "boycott the United States" but "not the World Cup", Iranian football federation president Mehdi Taj said in a video.

topStories.title: Palam fire: Man who lost 9 family members revisits inferno site, says ‘system failed us’
topStories.description: "This is the system's failure. Had there been a timely response, my family would have been alive," Kashyap claimed as he revisited his charred home.

topStories.title: It has been testing time, not just for us, but entire global community: MEA on West Asia situation
topStories.description: It has been testing time, not just for us, but entire global community: MEA on West Asia situation

topStories.title: 11-Year-Old Boy Charged With Murder Of Younger Brother In Colorado: Reports
topStories.description: An 11-year-old boy suspected of killing his five-year-old brother in Colorado has been charged with murder, US media reported Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Child among survivors pulled from rubble of US-Israeli attack in Iran
dailyNews.description: Video from Iran’s Red Crescent showed a child among survivors pulled from the wreckage of a US-Israeli air attack.

dailyNews.title: Arc expands into electric commercial and defense boats with $50M raise
dailyNews.description: The Los Angeles startup raised $50 million from Eclipse, a16z, Menlo Ventures, and others as it seeks to expand beyond sport boats.

dailyNews.title: Defectors from Congress in BJP’s first list of 88 candidates for Assam election
dailyNews.description: CM Himanta Sarma to contest from Jalukbari seat; Nagaon MP Pradyut Bordoloi, who quit the Congress, has been named as the BJP candidate from Dispur, while Bhupen Kumar Borah, who also joined the BJP recently from the Congress, will contest from Bihpura; Deputy Speaker Numal Momin and Minister Nandita Garlosa are dropped

dailyNews.title: The US–Israel war with Iran will not end with a clear victor
dailyNews.description: An arrangement that allows each side to claim it achieved its core goals is the most likely path out.

dailyNews.title: Cyprus leader calls for frank discussion on 'colonial' UK bases
dailyNews.description: The UK's two military bases on Cyprus are a "colonial consequence" on the island, says President Nikos Christodoulides.

dailyNews.title: Inside a $1.1B deal to reshore critical minerals refining
dailyNews.description: Critical minerals startup Nth Cycle is betting that its modular approach to nickel refining can make the practice viable in the U.S. and Europe.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Miller vows no refugee spillover into US as Iran conflict intensifies
dailyNews.description: White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller promises no refugee spillover from Iran conflict, contrasting sharply with the previous administration's policies.

dailyNews.title: Former Duke player describes Coach K's way of dumbing down March Madness bracket into micro tournaments
dailyNews.description: Duke basketball icon Jay Bilas explained how Mike Krzyzewski's genius method transformed March Madness anxiety into manageable micro tournaments.

dailyNews.title: RI hockey player whose family members were killed by trans shooter helps team to championship
dailyNews.description: Colin Dorgan, who family members were killed by a trans shooter, helped his high school ice hockey team to a Rhode Island state championship on Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Georgia gubernatorial hopeful vows to ‘ban DEI’ but his own company touted diversity and inclusion
dailyNews.description: Georgia governor candidate Rick Jackson now promises to 'ban DEI insanity' despite reportedly supporting diversity programs at his healthcare company.

dailyNews.title: Florida hospital sues to evict patient who refuses to leave for months
dailyNews.description: A Florida hospital is seeking a court order to remove a patient who has allegedly refused to leave for 5 months after being discharged.

dailyNews.title: WILLIAM BENNETT, ROB NOEL: America's moral decline demands action. What conservatives must do now
dailyNews.description: Without a common moral vocabulary rooted in American tradition and common decency, we cannot sustain the republic. Polarization will harden into hatred.

dailyNews.title: Yankees broadcaster takes issue with 'wrapping sports in the flag and preaching patriotism'
dailyNews.description: New York Yankees broadcaster Michael Kay seemingly had an issue with World Baseball Classic players "wrapping sports in the flag and preaching patriotism."

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens key Iranian gas field after Israeli strike
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump warned that if Iran targets a Qatari liquefied natural gas facililty again, America will attack Iran's "South Pars Gas Field."

dailyNews.title: 12 Arab and Islamic countries unite to condemn 'heinous' Iranian attacks
dailyNews.description: A coalition of 12 Arab and Islamic countries denounces Iran’s attacks on civilian infrastructure, urges restraint and warns of risks to regional security.

dailyNews.title: Multiple beaches deemed unsafe as officials issue urgent health warnings to public
dailyNews.description: A swimming warning is issued for some LA County beaches due to contaminated water. Bacteria levels are exceeding safety standards at Santa Monica, Venice and Malibu.

topStories.title: Federal judge temporarily changes grand jury rules after Trump effort to charge members of Congress
topStories.description: Federal judge orders new transparency rules for grand jury proceedings after Trump's failed attempt to secure indictments against six Democratic lawmakers.

topStories.title: John Fetterman says Trump Derangement Syndrome is the 'leader' of the Democratic Party
topStories.description: Sen. John Fetterman, D-Pa., says that Trump Derangement Syndrome is the Democratic Party's leader, criticizing fellow Democrats for being "inflexible."

topStories.title: Sunny Hostin dismisses 'The View' guest host's Iran war comments: 'if that helps you sleep at night'
topStories.description: "The View" erupted in heated debate when CNBC guest host Sara Eisen objected to claims that Israel pressured President Donald Trump into launching military operations in Iran.

topStories.title: What’s a Threat? Gabbard Says It’s Up to Trump, on Iran and Elsewhere.
topStories.description: Tulsi Gabbard, the director of national intelligence, was left to square the president’s comments about an imminent nuclear threat from Iran with a letter from one of her trusted aides.

topStories.title: Trump Says U.S. and Qatar Not Involved in Strike on Iran’s South Pars Gas Field
topStories.description: President Trump said Israel was responsible for the attack, but vowed to “massively” destroy the gas field if Tehran hit Qatar’s energy facilities in retaliation.

topStories.title: ‘Go Big and Go Loud’: Inside the Justice Dept.’s Push to Prosecute Protesters
topStories.description: Prosecutors have struggled to prove in court what the president and his aides have repeatedly said in public: that a network of leftist activists presents a serious threat to national security.

topStories.title: Trump Vowed to Crack Down on Fraudsters, but He’s Pardoned Dozens
topStories.description: Across both of his terms, President Trump has granted clemency to more than 70 allies, donors and others convicted in fraud cases.

dailyNews.title: Trump Vowed to Crack Down on Fraudsters, but He’s Pardoned Dozens
dailyNews.description: Across both of his terms, President Trump has granted clemency to more than 70 allies, donors and others convicted in fraud cases.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Planning for America’s 250th Emphasizes Religion’s Role in the Nation’s Founding
dailyNews.description: A closed-door White House event included news about the National Garden of American Heroes and an emphasis on the role of religion in the founding.

dailyNews.title: How Japan’s Leader Sanae Takaichi Found Her Voice in D.C. Decades Ago
dailyNews.description: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi got her start in politics as an intern for a trailblazing Colorado lawmaker. She returns to Washington this week to meet with President Trump.

dailyNews.title: The Markets Contend with Powell’s Long Goodbye at the Fed
dailyNews.description: The chair of the Federal Reserve said that he might not leave the central bank any time soon, setting up a potential clash with President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Iran Targets Energy Sites After Israel Hit World's Largest Gas Field
dailyNews.description: Iran attacked oil and gas sites in Saudi Arabia, Qatar, the United Arab Emirates and Kuwait as the conflict rapidly becomes a war on the world’s energy supply. Iran says it is retaliation after Israel attacked the South Pars natural gas refinery on the Iranian coast which holds the largest gas reserves in the world. President Donald Trump says the United States was not involved in the original hit on the South Pars but is threatening to blow up the entirety of the gas field if Iran attacks Qat

dailyNews.title: Some DHS contractors told White House officials they were asked to pay Corey Lewandowski
dailyNews.description: Some companies complained to the Trump administration that Lewandowski has stood to personally profit from the DHS contracting process. Lewandowski denies the allegations.

dailyNews.title: Japanese leader faces a 'very difficult' meeting with Trump as he presses for help with Iran
dailyNews.description: Few world leaders seem to get along with President Donald Trump as well as Sanae Takaichi.

dailyNews.title: Top intelligence officials spar with senators at hearing on threats to U.S.
dailyNews.description: Top intelligence officials testified Wednesday at a Senate hearing on national security threats. Leaders, including Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard, were pressed on some of the conflicting claims that continue to come from the Trump administration about the nuclear threat Iran did or did not pose before the war. Nancy Cordes reports.

dailyNews.title: Key takeaways from Tulsi Gabbard's Iran testimony that appeared to shield Trump administration
dailyNews.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard is testifying on Capitol Hill for a second day on Thursday after a contentious hearing before senators, where she appeared to hold back on information about the Iran war's objectives. Andrew Boyd, former chief of operations for the CIA Counterterrorism Mission Center, joins with more insight.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Israel and Iran after strikes on energy facilities
dailyNews.description: New strikes in the Iran war are impacting the oil and gas markets. Qatar's Ras Laffan gas facility was in flames after Iranian strikes, which followed an Israeli strike on Iran's vast South Pars natural gas field. President Trump issued warnings to both Israel and Iran. Charlie D'Agata reports.

dailyNews.title: Iran war escalates as Trump threatens to "massively blow up" Iranian gas field
dailyNews.description: President Trump is grappling with an expansion in the war against Iran after Israeli strikes targeted Tehran's South Pars natural gas field, and as the regime targeted a key natural gas facility in Qatar. CBS News' Ramy Inocencio and Natalie Brand report.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
